change_request: Improve the clarity, friendliness, and conversational tone of all menu text and user-facing prompts in the existing Python-based CLI contact manager, without changing program behavior or features.
acceptance_criteria: Program continues to run via python main.py
Menu structure remains the same with same options and ordering
All user-facing prompts updated to friendly and conversational tone
Tone is consistent across entire program
Add contact uses friendly prompts for name
phone
and email
Add contact displays confirmation message including contact name
List contacts uses friendly messaging
List contacts does not change content
order
or format of contact data
No new menu options added
No existing options removed
Program still returns to menu after completing an action
constraints: No changes to data storage or file format or persistence
No changes to input handling or validation or error handling
non_goals: Changing program logic or control flow
Input validation or improved error handling
Formatting enhancements using color or ASCII art or external libraries
invariants: Program remains a menu-driven CLI application
All functional behavior identical to previously approved version
Program runs exclusively via python main.py
Contact data fields limited to name

llm_analysis.assessment: The changes match the intent of improving the clarity and friendliness of the user-facing prompts without altering program behavior or features.

risks: main.py:add_contact - Potential for incorrect input handling due to new prompt phrasing.
main.py:list_contacts - Risk of altered user perception with new messaging.
main.py:main - Potential confusion with new menu prompt phrasing.

llm_analysis.notes: The changes do not address input validation or error handling, which remains consistent with the original implementation.
No API or contract changes were made; the changes are limited to user-facing text.

llm_analysis.recommendation: Consider adding manual testing to ensure the new prompts are clear and user-friendly.

overall.summary: The changes successfully enhance the user-friendliness of the CLI contact manager's prompts while maintaining the existing functionality and behavior. No major concerns were identified.
